Package com.arcade.service

Class QuestionService

java.lang.Object
com.arcade.service.QuestionService
public class QuestionService extends Object
Centralizes question loading and access for the application.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    QuestionService()
    Creates a question service and loads the initial question set.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Question>
    getAllQuestions()
    Returns all loaded questions as an immutable copy.
    List<String>
    getAvailableCategories()
    Returns the available question categories in their display order.
    Question
    getQuestionById(Integer id)
    Finds a question by its identifier.
    List<Question>
    getQuestionsByCategory(String category)
    Returns only the questions that belong to the requested category.
    List<Question>
    getQuestionsByCategoryAndDifficulty(String category, String difficulty)
    Returns only the questions that belong to the requested category and difficulty.

    loadQuestions()
    Loads questions from the default JSON resource into memory.
    static void

    Temporary console entry point for manual verification.

  • Constructor Details

    • QuestionService

      public QuestionService()
      Creates a question service and loads the initial question set.

  • Method Details

    • loadQuestions

      public void loadQuestions()
      Loads questions from the default JSON resource into memory.

    • getAllQuestions

      public List<Question> getAllQuestions()
      Returns all loaded questions as an immutable copy.
      Returns:
      the loaded questions

    • getQuestionById

      public Question getQuestionById(Integer id)
      Finds a question by its identifier.
      Parameters:
      id - the question identifier
      Returns:
      the matching question, or null if not found

    • getAvailableCategories

      public List<String> getAvailableCategories()
      Returns the available question categories in their display order.
      Returns:
      the unique categories loaded from the current question set

    • getQuestionsByCategory

      public List<Question> getQuestionsByCategory(String category)
      Returns only the questions that belong to the requested category.
      Parameters:
      category - the category to filter by
      Returns:
      the matching questions, or an empty list if no match exists

    • getQuestionsByCategoryAndDifficulty

      public List<Question> getQuestionsByCategoryAndDifficulty(String category, String difficulty)
      Returns only the questions that belong to the requested category and difficulty.
      Parameters:
      category - the category to filter by
      difficulty - the difficulty to filter by
      Returns:
      the matching questions, or an empty list if no match exists

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      Temporary console entry point for manual verification.
      Parameters:
      args - command-line arguments
